# Beta memo (v1) — placeholder body

Older version of beta-memo. The alpha-memo fixture cites
`beta-memo.latest`, which resolves to `beta-memo.2/` (the highest
version under `beta-memo/`) via the walk-to-highest fallback.

This file exists so the fixture has a non-trivial version-history shape
(`.1` AND `.2`) the walk-to-highest fallback can pick between.
